text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I'm at Hanshin Racecourse to watch a big race. And
low and behold, who should I run into but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wait, aren't you—oh wow! That badge... I didn't realize you were a
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, there's no need for that! Call me Fine Motion. It's nice to see
you again—I had a wonderful time the other day!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence, though. Who would've thought I'd see you
here... Although, I suppose this must be an excellent learning
opportunity for a trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: As for me, I'm here to watch... someone amazing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome to join me if you'd like. I got up extra early to get a
good spot! Let's cheer her on together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They've entered the backstretch! Today's favorite, T.M. Opera O,
cruises along at the center of the pack. At the rear, we have Air
Shakur, keeping an eye on the competition!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh. Just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur! Good luuuck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion bounces up and down excitedly as she cheers, eyes
glued to Air Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Shakur is such an inspiring racer. She's so clever... but she's also
painstakingly straightforward when it comes to her goals!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They round the final corner and begin their last spurt down the
homestretch! T.M. Opera O breaks away from the pack—is the lead
hers?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Not yet! Watch what Shakur's doing. The last spurt is where she shines
brightest!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur! Air Shakur chases the lead! What precision—Air Shakur
catches up just before the goal! Will it be enough?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah... Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As Fine Motion cheers, something catches my attention.
choice_data_list:
(She's got the same twinkle in her eye as she
did the other day...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That was a great race, Shakur! Especially the last spurt—the way you
caught up was breathtaking! My heart is still going wild...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch... Catch up, my ass. I got second, idiot.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, well... I know you wanted to win, but... that doesn't change how
impressive your technique was one bit.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The sheer precision you displayed shows just how much time you
spent calculating everything. And then the fierce determination as
you ran... It really, truly was stunning.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I made a very special memory today. Thank you, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I escort Fine Motion back to Tracen and listen to her gush the entire
way.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, I can't get over it! Shakur was so cool! Wasn't the last spurt
amazing? The way she went all-out at the end gave me chills!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I keep seeing it over and over in my head! She was biding her time at
first, and then she took off like, like—

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Ah! Your Highness, come back!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Not yet... Not yet! I have to save my stamina, and then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sudden take-off caught me off guard, but I'm even more shocked
by how skilled she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her form is a little rough, but that just means she could go even faster with training! But most of all...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Now! The last... spurt! Yaaaah!
choice_data_list: (She's got that gleam in her eyes again.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm frozen in place watching her. The way she runs just looks so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So fun.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Your Highness! Wh-what on earth do you think you're doing?! Have
you forgotten the terms of the study abroad trip? You mustn't
over-exert yourself!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Eh? ...Oh! I beg your pardon! I don't know what came over me... I'm
sorry.
choice_data_list:
Wait... Does that mean you're not allowed to
run?

Wait... Does that mean you're not allowed to
run?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Yes, I'm afraid it does.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was given leave to study abroad on the condition that I'd avoid
anything dangerous. That includes strenuous physical activities, so...
no running, and certainly no races.
choice_data_list: But if you're not allowed to race, then...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Silly as it sounds, I wanted to study at Tracen, no matter what it took!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There are Umamusume my age, pouring their whole hearts into their
dreams... I wanted to talk to them—to be their friend.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All in the hopes that someday those memories will give me strength.
When it comes time to shoulder my own fate, I'll have all these
wonderful experiences to draw upon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The words come out so naturally, it makes them feel that much darker.
I painfully realize that no matter how friendly or unassuming she
seems now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion has unimaginably heavy responsibilities waiting for her
back home.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm lucky that Japan is such a safe country! I don't know how I
would've convinced my father otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've already made so many friends, I got to visit restaurants I dreamed
of, and I've seen top-class races in person.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'll be going home with the biggest smile!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The words escape before I can stop myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help it. She keeps emphasizing how "happy" she is just to visit
places or meet people... But I don't believe for second that she's
happy just watching other students race. After all...
choice_data_list:
Are you really getting the experience you
wanted?

Are you really getting the experience you
wanted?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her eyes have lost all the light they had at the race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... I...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
...Your Highness. It is growing cold. You should return to the
dormitory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's it. Security leads her away without another word. But...
even without a proper answer, Fine Motion's reaction said everything.
choice_data_list: (I'm sure this isn't what she wants!)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey. You. Do you have any idea what that little stunt did to her?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Cut the crap! You know what I mean!
...Damn it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you haven't got the guts to follow through, then piss off and stop
making things worse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shakur's stern advice stings, and the matter weighs ever more heavily
on my mind...
